title: HOMEOWNERSHIP PROGRAM - 211info
text: NORTH WILLAMETTE VALLEY HABITAT FOR HUMANITY HOMEOWNERSHIP PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides an opportunity for families to build and buy their own homes. The houses are sold at an affordable price to homeowners. From application to owning a home takes approximately 18-24 months. Habitat is a long-term homeownership program and does not provide emergency housing. 225 Franklin Street Mount Angel, OR 97362 Eligibility: Families currently living in substandard housing who meet all of the following requirements: -Income guidelines -Can commit to 500 hours of sweat equity in construction -United States citizens or permanent residents -Have not have owned a home in the past 3 years -Have the ability to pay a mortgage payment with steady income and decent credit history Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Email (503) 845-2434 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 845-2434 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: Households pay an affordable mortgage. Mortgage lengths vary depending on income; the length of the mortgage is adjusted so that the monthly mortgage payment (which includes taxes, insurance, and condo fees, if applicable) is no more than 30% of the homeowner's gross monthly income at the time of sale. DOCUMENTS: Proof of income AREA SERVED: Cities of Canby, Gervais, Hubbard, Molalla, Mt. Angel, Silverton, and Woodburn Services: Home Purchase/Construction Financing/Refinancing Subsidized Home Acquisition If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. NORTH WILLAMETTE VALLEY HABITAT FOR HUMANITY
